collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (7 total Queries, 7 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') as month, COUNT(id) as total_orders, SUM(total_price) as total_revenue FROM `orders` WHERE `created_at` >= '2025-11-01' GROUP BY `month` ORDER BY `month` ASC

SELECT `order_items`.*, `products`.`name` as `product_name`, `products`.`photo` as `product_photo`, SUM(order_items.quantity) as total_sales, `products`.`price` as `product_price`, `suppliers`.`name` as `supplier_name` FROM `order_items` JOIN `products` ON `products`.`id` = `order_items`.`product_id` LEFT JOIN `suppliers` ON `suppliers`.`id` = `products`.`supplier_id` GROUP BY `order_items`.`product_id` ORDER BY `total_sales` DESC LIMIT 5

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') as month, COUNT(id) as total_orders, SUM(total_price) as total_revenue FROM `orders` WHERE `created_at` >= '2025-11-01' GROUP BY `month` ORDER BY `month` ASC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `order_items`.*, `products`.`name` as `product_name`, `products`.`photo` as `product_photo`, SUM(order_items.quantity) as total_sales, `products`.`price` as `product_price`, `suppliers`.`name` as `supplier_name` FROM `order_items` JOIN `products` ON `products`.`id` = `order_items`.`product_id` LEFT JOIN `suppliers` ON `suppliers`.`id` = `products`.`supplier_id` GROUP BY `order_items`.`product_id` ORDER BY `total_sales` DESC LIMIT 5
